title: Greek Yogurt Chicken Bowl
steps: Season chicken breast with garlic powder, paprika, salt and pepper.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Cook chicken 6–7 min per side until cooked through.
Rest 5 minutes, then slice.
Serve over Greek yogurt with cucumber on the side.

title: Salmon & Quinoa Plate
steps: Cook quinoa according to package instructions.
Season salmon with salt, pepper and lemon juice.
Heat oil in a pan, cook salmon skin-side down 4 min, flip and cook 3 more minutes.
Sauté spinach with garlic for 1 min until wilted.
Plate quinoa, top with salmon and spinach.

title: High-Protein Tuna Salad
steps: Drain tuna thoroughly and flake into a bowl.
Add cottage cheese and Dijon mustard; mix well.
Fold in celery and dill.
Season with salt and pepper. Serve on lettuce wraps or crackers.

title: Egg White Turkey Omelette
steps: Whisk egg whites with a pinch of salt until frothy.
Heat a non-stick pan with cooking spray over medium heat.
Pour in egg whites; cook until edges set (about 2 min).
Scatter turkey, peppers and spinach on one half.
Fold omelette and cook 2 more minutes. Top with feta.

title: Cottage Cheese Protein Pancakes
steps: Blend all ingredients until smooth.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat with cooking spray.
Pour ~1/4 cup batter per pancake; cook 2–3 min until bubbles form.
Flip and cook 1 more minute. Serve with berries or sugar-free syrup.

title: Lean Beef Stir-Fry
steps: Mix soy sauce, sesame oil, garlic and ginger in a small bowl.
Heat a wok or large pan over high heat until smoking.
Stir-fry beef in batches, 1–2 min per batch. Set aside.
Add broccoli and snap peas; stir-fry 3–4 min until tender-crisp.
Return beef, pour sauce over, toss for 1 minute.
